name: 复杂 prompt
purpose: 测评不同 垂类型下、不同场景下的效果。以及不同 Prompt 的复杂度的效果。 你需要考虑不同垂直领域下的用词丰富度。每个query 字数超过 300
queries: 在一片广袤的原始森林深处，清晨的第一缕阳光穿透浓密的树冠，形成丁达尔光柱，照射在布满青苔的古老岩石上。林间薄雾缭绕，远处有一条清澈的山涧溪流蜿蜒流淌，水面倒映着周围翠绿的植被。画面前景是几株蕨类植物和野生蘑菇，中景是高耸入云的红杉树干，背景是若隐若现的山峦轮廓。整体色调以深绿、翠绿、金黄为主，光影层次丰富，营造出一种神秘而宁静的自然氛围。摄影风格，超高清，8K分辨率，广角镜头，景深效果明显。
繁华都市夜景，从高空俯瞰视角拍摄一座现代化国际大都市的核心商业区。无数摩天大楼的玻璃幕墙在夜色中闪烁着五彩斑斓的灯光，高速公路上车流形成的红白光轨如同流动的血脉穿越城市。远处港湾中停泊着巨型邮轮，霓虹灯广告牌将天空映照得五光十色。画面中心是一座标志性的超高层建筑，其顶部探照灯扫射夜空。整体采用赛博朋克风格调色，蓝紫色调为主，高对比度，细节极其丰富，电影级画质，无人机航拍视角，长曝光效果。
一位身着精致汉服的古典美人坐于江南水乡的木质亭台之上，手持团扇，回眸凝视远方。亭台四周是盛开的荷花池，粉白色荷花在微风中轻轻摇曳，荷叶上滚动着晶莹的水珠。背景是白墙黛瓦的徽派建筑群，青石板小路蜿蜒其间，几只白鹭在水面低飞。人物服饰以淡青色和金色刺绣为主，发髻上插着玉簪和珍珠发饰，妆容精致典雅。整体画风融合工笔画细腻与写意画意境，色彩清雅，构图对称，充满诗情画意的东方美学韵味，4K超清。

专业美食摄影：一道精心摆盘的法式米其林三星级主菜——慢煮法式鸭胸配松露酱汁。鸭胸肉切片整齐排列，表皮呈现完美的金棕色焦脆质感，肉质粉嫩多汁。旁边点缀着微型蔬菜园艺装饰，包括迷你胡萝卜、紫色菊苣叶、食用花卉。松露酱汁以艺术性的方式涂抹在白色骨瓷盘边缘，几片新鲜黑松露薄片覆盖其上。背景是深色大理石台面，侧光打亮，营造出高级餐厅的奢华氛围。镜头使用微距特写，景深浅，焦点精准落在鸭胸肉的截面纹理上，色彩饱和度高，专业商业摄影级别。

科幻概念艺术：2387年的火星殖民地全景图。红色荒漠地表上矗立着巨大的透明穹顶城市群，穹顶内部可见郁郁葱葱的植被和高楼建筑。穹顶外部有巨型太阳能采集阵列和大气层改造装置在运转。天空呈现火星特有的橙红色调，远处可见奥林匹斯山的轮廓。前景是一队身着先进宇航服的探险者正在进行地质勘探，旁边停放着多辆六轮驱动的火星车。整体风格参考硬科幻美学，写实主义渲染，光照模拟火星实际日照条件，色彩以赭红、橙黄、银灰为主色调，画面宏大壮观，充满未来感，电影级CGI质量。

时尚大片：极简主义风格的高端女装商业摄影。模特身着本季最新设计的纯白色结构性礼服，站立于全白色无缝背景纸前。礼服采用建筑感廓形设计，肩部有夸张的立体剪裁结构，腰部收紧，裙摆呈A字展开。模特姿态优雅挺拔，侧身45度，头部微微上扬，眼神凌厉而自信。打光采用蝴蝶光布局，主光源从正上方45度角打下，营造出高光与阴影的强烈对比，突显服装的立体结构感。整体色调极简，黑白灰为主，只有模特嘴唇的深红色作为点缀。摄影风格参考赫尔穆特·牛顿的经典时尚摄影美学，高对比度，锐利清晰，专业商业级别。

儿童绘本插画风格：一只戴着圆形眼镜、穿着蓝色条纹背带裤的小熊猫正在一间温馨的树屋图书馆里读书。树屋内部陈设可爱，四周书架上摆满了各种颜色的书籍，窗外是秋天金黄色的森林。小熊猫坐在一把豆袋椅上，手捧一本大书，旁边有一杯冒着热气的可可饮料和几块饼干。阳光透过圆形小窗洒进来，照在书页上形成温暖的光斑。画面中还有几只小动物朋友：一只松鼠在书架上整理书籍，一只小兔子在角落里打盹。整体风格温馨可爱，色彩明亮饱和，线条圆润流畅，充满童趣，适合3-8岁儿童阅读的绘本插画风格。

建筑摄影：日本京都某座著名禅宗寺院的枯山水庭园全景。庭园中白色砂砾被精心耙出同心圆和波纹图案，象征大海与波浪。几块形态各异的苔藓覆盖的岩石错落有致地分布其中，代表岛屿与山峰。庭园四周是低矮的木质回廊，廊柱投下整齐的阴影。背景是一面古朴的土墙，墙头长有青苔。整体画面在秋季午后的斜阳下，砂砾呈现出温暖的米白色，岩石的阴影拉长，营造出极度宁静、禅意深远的东方美学氛围。摄影采用广角镜头，低角度拍摄，强调庭园的几何美感与空间延伸感，色调沉稳内敛，高清晰度。

数字艺术插画：深海奇幻世界。在数千米深的海底，一座古代文明的遗迹城市在生物发光的光芒中若隐若现。巨大的石柱和拱门上覆盖着珊瑚和海葵，各种奇异的深海生物在废墟间穿梭游弋——巨型水母发出蓝紫色荧光，透明的深海鱼类携带着自身的发光器官，远处有一头巨型章鱼的触手从黑暗中伸出。画面中心有一位身着古代服饰的人鱼公主正在检视一块刻有神秘符文的石碑。整体色调以深邃的蓝黑色为基调，点缀着大量生物发光的青绿色、紫色和金色光点，营造出神秘、梦幻、壮观的深海奇幻氛围，数字绘画风格，细节极其丰富。

产品商业摄影：高端机械腕表的静物特写。一枚顶级瑞士制表品牌的陀飞轮腕表平放于深色碳纤维纹理表面上，表盘朝上。表盘直径约42毫米，采用骨架镂空设计，可清晰看见内部精密的机械机芯运转结构，包括摆轮、游丝、齿轮系和陀飞轮装置。表壳为18K玫瑰金材质，表圈镶嵌一圈钻石，皮质表带呈深棕色鳄鱼皮纹理。打光采用专业珠宝摄影布光方案，多角度柔光箱确保金属表面的高光均匀而不过曝，同时突显机芯的精密细节。背景虚化处理，焦点精准落在陀飞轮装置上，微距镜头，超高清，色彩还原精准，奢侈品商业摄影级别。

游戏概念原画：中世纪奇幻风格的巨龙巢穴场景。在一座活火山的熔岩洞穴深处，一条体型庞大的古龙盘踞在金币和宝物堆积成的山丘之上。龙鳞呈现深红与黑色交织的色彩，双翼展开遮蔽了大半洞穴空间，眼睛发出炽热的金色光芒。洞穴四壁有熔岩流淌，橙红色的光芒映照在龙鳞上形成复杂的光影效果。宝物堆中可见各种奇异的魔法器物、古代盔甲和发光的魔法宝石。远处洞穴入口透进一缕月光，与熔岩的暖光形成冷暖对比。整体风格参考《龙与地下城》的经典奇幻美学，写实风格渲染，色彩以深红、橙金、黑色为主，画面气势磅礴，充满史诗感，专业游戏概念原画级别。

室内设计效果图：一间融合北欧极简主义与日式侘寂美学的现代客厅。空间以白色和浅灰色为主色调，地板采用浅色白橡木实木地板，墙面是哑光白色涂料。主沙发为低矮的亚麻米白色布艺款式，搭配几个不同质感的抱枕。茶几是一块不规则形态的天然石材，保留原始边缘。角落里有一棵高大的琴叶榕盆栽，旁边是一盏细长的弧形落地灯。书架上摆放着少量精选书籍和陶瓷摆件，遵循断舍离原则。大落地窗引入充足的自然光，窗外是模糊的绿色植被。整体营造出一种安静、克制、充满禅意的生活空间氛围，建筑可视化渲染，真实感强，光线自然柔和。

人文纪实摄影风格：印度瓦拉纳西恒河边的清晨祈祷仪式。数百名印度教信徒聚集在恒河的石阶河坛上，进行传统的晨祷仪式。画面中心是一位身着橙色僧袍的老祭司，手持铜制油灯，在袅袅烟雾中虔诚地进行祭祀。周围信徒有的浸入河中沐浴，有的双手合十祈祷，有的在河边点燃油灯放入水中。晨曦的金色阳光从地平线升起，将整个场景染成暖金色调。河面上漂浮着无数盛放鲜花的小油灯，倒映在平静的水面上。整体画面充满宗教仪式感和人文温度，构图采用黄金分割，前景虚化的花瓣，中景是主体人物，背景是恒河对岸的轮廓，胶片质感，色彩浓郁。

电影海报设计：一部关于人工智能觉醒的科幻惊悚电影的主视觉海报。画面主体是一个半人半机械的面孔，左半边是精致的人类女性面孔，右半边是暴露出精密电路板和金属骨架的机械结构，两者在中线处完美融合过渡。背景是一个巨大的数字矩阵空间，无数绿色代码从天而降。整体色调以冷蓝色和绿色为主，带有强烈的赛博朋克视觉风格。标题文字区域预留在画面下方三分之一处。人物眼神直视观众，一只眼睛是人类的棕色眼睛，另一只是发光的蓝色机械眼。整体构图垂直居中，视觉冲击力强，充满悬疑与科技感，专业电影海报级别的合成与渲染质量。

水彩插画风格：欧洲小镇的普罗旺斯薰衣草田园风光。在法国南部的一个宁静小镇郊外，大片紫色薰衣草田延伸至远方的山丘。田间有一条蜿蜒的碎石小路，路旁是高大的柏树排列成行。远处山坡上有一座石砌的古老磨坊，橙色屋顶在阳光下格外醒目。天空是明媚的蔚蓝色，点缀着几朵蓬松的白云。画面前景有一位戴着草帽的老农正在薰衣草田间劳作，旁边停着一辆装满薰衣草束的木质手推车。整体采用透明水彩技法，色彩通透明亮，笔触轻盈，紫色、蓝色、绿色和橙色形成和谐的色彩搭配，充满法式田园生活的浪漫气息，插画风格温馨治愈。

体育运动摄影：NBA总决赛高光时刻。一位身穿23号球衣的球星在对方两名防守球员的包夹下腾空而起，完成一记震撼全场的扣篮。球员身体在空中呈现出完美的运动弧线，肌肉线条在灯光下清晰可见，表情充满爆发力与专注。背景是爆满的球场观众席，数万名观众起立欢呼，闪光灯如同星海般闪烁。地板上的球场标线和品牌LOGO清晰可见。摄影采用超高速快门凝固运动瞬间，1/2000秒曝光，画面锐利无运动模糊。打光采用专业体育场馆的多点高亮度照明，色温统一。构图采用低角度仰拍，强调球员的高度和爆发力，背景观众席形成壮观的虚化效果，专业体育摄影级别。

中国传统工笔重彩画风格：百鸟朝凤图。以中国传统绘画的全景式构图，描绘一幅气势恢宏的百鸟朝凤图卷。画面中心是一对展翅翱翔的凤凰，雄凤羽毛以朱红、金黄、翠绿为主色，雌凤以粉紫、银白、青蓝为主色，双凤在云霞间相互呼应。四周汇聚了数十种珍禽异鸟：孔雀开屏、仙鹤起舞、锦鸡觅食、鹦鹉嬉戏，各种鸟类姿态各异，栩栩如生。背景是云蒸霞蔚的仙境山川，苍松翠柏，奇花异草点缀其间。整体采用工笔重彩技法，线条精细流畅，色彩浓郁华美，金粉勾勒羽毛细节，充分体现中国传统绘画的精湛技艺与吉祥富贵的文化寓意。

医疗健康科普插画：人体心血管系统的3D可视化示意图。以高度写实的医学插画风格，展示人体心脏及主要血管系统的精细解剖结构。心脏被切开展示内部四个腔室的结构，包括左右心房、左右心室，以及各瓣膜的位置和形态。主动脉、肺动脉、上下腔静脉等主要血管以不同颜色区分——动脉系统用鲜红色，静脉系统用深蓝色。血液流动方向用箭头和动态光效标注。心肌纤维的纹理清晰可见，冠状动脉在心脏表面的走行路径用金色高亮标注。整体背景为深色，使解剖结构更加突出清晰。风格参考Netter医学插画的精准写实风格，同时加入现代3D渲染的质感，适合医学教育使用，标注文字预留空间。

概念时装设计效果图：以深海生物为灵感来源的高级定制礼服系列。设计师将深海水母、珊瑚礁和生物发光元素融入服装设计中。主打款式是一件拖地晚礼服，裙身采用多层半透明欧根纱，每层都印有水母触须的图案，在灯光下呈现出神秘的蓝紫色荧光效果。胸衣部分以立体刺绣技法呈现珊瑚礁的质感，镶嵌有蓝色、绿色和紫色的施华洛世奇水晶。模特站立于全黑背景前，专业舞台灯光从多角度打亮，使服装的透明质感和发光效果得到最佳呈现。整体画面充满奢华感与艺术性，时装插画与摄影合成风格，色彩以深海蓝、荧光紫、珊瑚橙为主，高级定制时装周大片级别。

乡村田园风光摄影：中国江南水乡的油菜花季。在浙江某个古老村落，漫山遍野的油菜花正值盛开，金黄色的花海延伸至天际线。村落中白墙黑瓦的传统民居散落在花海之间，几缕炊烟从屋顶袅袅升起。村前有一条清澈的小河，河上横跨着一座古老的石拱桥，桥边垂柳依依，嫩绿的柳条随风飘拂。远处丘陵上的茶园呈现出整齐的梯田状绿色纹理，与金黄色的油菜花田形成鲜明的色彩对比。天空是清澈的蓝色，几朵白云点缀其间。画面中有几位身着传统服饰的村民在田间劳作，增添了生活气息。摄影采用无人机航拍与地面长焦镜头相结合，色彩饱和度适中，光线为上午10点的自然光，画面充满诗意与生机。

赛博朋克城市街头场景插画：2077年的新东京街头夜景。在一条狭窄拥挤的霓虹街道上，各种文化元素混杂交融。街道两侧是密密麻麻的日文、中文、英文霓虹招牌，颜色以粉红、青蓝、橙黄为主，将整条街道照得如同白昼。街道上行人摩肩接踵，有身着传统和服但配戴高科技义体的日本女性，有穿着破旧工装的增强改造工人，有全息投影的虚拟偶像在空中表演。地面上积水倒映着所有的霓虹灯光，形成梦幻的镜像效果。空中有无人机快递穿梭，悬浮广告牌播放着各种商品广告。画面景深极深，从近景的街边小摊一直延伸到远处消失在雾霾中的摩天大楼群。整体风格参考《银翼杀手2049》的视觉美学，色彩浓烈，细节密集，充满未来感与末日感并存的独特氛围。

极地自然摄影：南极洲冰川与帝企鹅的壮观景象。在南极洲罗斯冰架附近，一片巨大的蓝色冰川在午夜阳光下呈现出超现实的美丽。冰川表面有深浅不一的蓝色纹理，从浅蓝到深邃的宝蓝色，冰裂缝中透出神秘的蓝光。冰川前方的海冰上，一群帝企鹅正在集体行进，数量约数百只，形成壮观的队列。前景有几只帝企鹅特写，可见其黑白相间的羽毛和橙黄色的喙部细节，以及幼崽依偎在父母脚下的温馨画面。天空是极地特有的淡金色，太阳低悬在地平线附近，将整个场景染成冷暖交织的色调。远处有更多冰山漂浮在平静的极地海面上。摄影采用超广角镜头，色彩还原真实，展现极地生态的壮美与脆弱，国家地理杂志封面级别。

古典油画风格人物肖像：以荷兰黄金时代绘画大师伦勃朗的光影技法，描绘一位当代都市职业女性的肖像。画面主体是一位约35岁的东方女性，身着深色西装，神情睿智而坚定。伦勃朗光打亮她的面部，形成经典的三角形高光区域，另一侧脸部在柔和的阴影中。背景是深棕色的暗调，几乎没有细节，将所有注意力集中在人物面部。女性手中握着一本厚重的书籍，手部细节刻画精细，可见指节和皮肤的质感。整体色调以棕褐色、赭石色、深红色为主，只有面部高光区域有明亮的暖白色。笔触厚重有力，油彩质感明显，既有古典大师的庄重气质，又融入了现代女性的独立精神，博物馆级别的艺术品质感。

食品包装设计效果图：一款高端有机抹茶系列产品的全套包装设计展示。产品线包括抹茶粉、抹茶巧克力、抹茶饼干和抹茶茶包，共四款产品整齐陈列在浅色木质台面上。包装设计风格融合日式极简美学与现代设计感，主色调为深浅不一的抹茶绿色系，配以米白色和金色细节。包装材质采用哑光纸质感，印有细腻的日本传统纹样作为底纹。每款产品的包装上都有一幅精致的抹茶茶园手绘插画，线条简洁优雅。产品名称采用中英日三语排版，字体选用衬线体与手写体的组合。背景有几片新鲜茶叶和抹茶粉末作为点缀装饰。整体画面清新高雅，充满东方美学气质，商业产品摄影与设计效果图合成风格，适合高端礼品市场定位。

天文科学可视化：银河系中心区域的壮观宇宙景象。以哈勃望远镜和詹姆斯·韦伯太空望远镜拍摄风格，呈现银河系核心区域的宏大景象。画面中心是一个超大质量黑洞，周围环绕着炽热的吸积盘，发出橙红色和白色的强烈辐射光芒。黑洞的引力透镜效应使背后的星光发生弯曲，形成完美的爱因斯坦环。周围密布着数以亿计的恒星，从蓝白色的年轻热星到橙红色的老年巨星，形成璀璨的星海。几条壮观的星云气体柱从画面边缘延伸，呈现出红色、橙色、紫色的发射星云色彩。远处有两个星系正在发生碰撞合并，形成壮观的潮汐尾流。整体色彩以深空黑为底，点缀着无数星点和彩色星云，视觉震撼，科学准确，天文摄影与科学可视化完美结合。

final_prompt.prompt: 专业美食摄影：一道精心摆盘的法式米其林三星级主菜——慢煮法式鸭胸配松露酱汁。鸭胸肉切片整齐排列，表皮呈现完美的金棕色焦脆质感，肉质粉嫩多汁。旁边点缀着微型蔬菜园艺装饰，包括迷你胡萝卜、紫色菊苣叶、食用花卉。松露酱汁以艺术性的方式涂抹在白色骨瓷盘边缘，几片新鲜黑松露薄片覆盖其上。背景是深色大理石台面，侧光打亮，营造出高级餐厅的奢华氛围。镜头使用微距特写，景深浅，焦点精准落在鸭胸肉的截面纹理上，色彩饱和度高，专业商业摄影级别。

final_prompt.prompt: 科幻概念艺术：2387年的火星殖民地全景图。红色荒漠地表上矗立着巨大的透明穹顶城市群，穹顶内部可见郁郁葱葱的植被和高楼建筑。穹顶外部有巨型太阳能采集阵列和大气层改造装置在运转。天空呈现火星特有的橙红色调，远处可见奥林匹斯山的轮廓。前景是一队身着先进宇航服的探险者正在进行地质勘探，旁边停放着多辆六轮驱动的火星车。整体风格参考硬科幻美学，写实主义渲染，光照模拟火星实际日照条件，色彩以赭红、橙黄、银灰为主色调，画面宏大壮观，充满未来感，电影级CGI质量。

final_prompt.prompt:
Create a cinematic still / sci-fi concept art panorama of a Mars colony in the year 2387.

Style/medium: hard sci-fi concept art, photorealistic CGI rendering in the tradition of films like The Martian and Interstellar, wide-format matte painting aesthetic
Composition: sweeping panoramic wide shot, low horizon line, extreme depth of field capturing foreground to distant mountain silhouette, akin to a 24mm anamorphic lens
Subject: cluster of massive transparent geodesic dome cities rising from the red Martian desert; dome interiors reveal lush green vegetation and towering urban structures; exterior surfaces host giant solar energy collection arrays and atmospheric terraforming devices in active operation; foreground features a team of explorers in advanced EVA suits conducting geological survey, with several six-wheeled Mars rovers parked nearby
Scene/backdrop: Martian surface, year 2387; barren ochre-red desert terrain stretching to the horizon; distant silhouette of Olympus Mons visible through haze; sky rendered in Mars-authentic orange-red tones with fine dust suspended in atmosphere
Lighting/mood: simulated Mars solar conditions — sunlight approximately 43% of Earth intensity, low-angle warm amber directional light casting long shadows, cool blue-grey fill from sky dome, overall mood of grand isolation and pioneering optimism
Color palette: terracotta red and ochre as dominant ground tones, burnt orange and amber in the sky, silver-grey metallic for dome structures and rover chassis, deep green as interior vegetation accent — all desaturated slightly to reflect Martian atmospheric filtering
Materials/textures: dust-coated matte metal surfaces on rovers and suits, semi-transparent polycarbonate dome panels with subtle light refraction, rocky regolith ground with fine sand texture, visible condensation on inner dome walls
Constraints: maintain scientific plausibility in dome scale, suit design, and solar array orientation; Olympus Mons silhouette must appear at correct low-profile distance; no Earth-blue sky
Avoid: Earth-like blue sky, cartoon or stylized rendering, generic silver spaceship clichés, oversaturated neon palette, lens flare abuse, watermark

final_prompt.prompt: 时尚大片：极简主义风格的高端女装商业摄影。模特身着本季最新设计的纯白色结构性礼服，站立于全白色无缝背景纸前。礼服采用建筑感廓形设计，肩部有夸张的立体剪裁结构，腰部收紧，裙摆呈A字展开。模特姿态优雅挺拔，侧身45度，头部微微上扬，眼神凌厉而自信。打光采用蝴蝶光布局，主光源从正上方45度角打下，营造出高光与阴影的强烈对比，突显服装的立体结构感。整体色调极简，黑白灰为主，只有模特嘴唇的深红色作为点缀。摄影风格参考赫尔穆特·牛顿的经典时尚摄影美学，高对比度，锐利清晰，专业商业级别。

Create an editorial fashion photo for a high-end womenswear commercial campaign, minimalist aesthetic.

Style/medium: photorealistic large-format fashion photography, high-contrast black-and-white with single color accent, referencing Helmut Newton's classic fashion editorial aesthetic — sharp, precise, commanding

Scene/backdrop: seamless all-white infinity paper backdrop, no environmental elements, pure studio void

Color palette: white, black, and mid-gray as the entire tonal range; deep red lips as the only chromatic element — all other color suppressed to near-monochrome
Materials/textures: crisp matte fabric with visible structural seams and sharp folded edges on the shoulder panels; smooth seamless paper background with no texture
Avoid: warm tones, soft diffused lighting, casual posture, busy background, color contamination beyond the red lip accent, over-retouched plastic skin, generic stock-photo composition

final_prompt.prompt: 儿童绘本插画风格：一只戴着圆形眼镜、穿着蓝色条纹背带裤的小熊猫正在一间温馨的树屋图书馆里读书。树屋内部陈设可爱，四周书架上摆满了各种颜色的书籍，窗外是秋天金黄色的森林。小熊猫坐在一把豆袋椅上，手捧一本大书，旁边有一杯冒着热气的可可饮料和几块饼干。阳光透过圆形小窗洒进来，照在书页上形成温暖的光斑。画面中还有几只小动物朋友：一只松鼠在书架上整理书籍，一只小兔子在角落里打盹。整体风格温馨可爱，色彩明亮饱和，线条圆润流畅，充满童趣，适合3-8岁儿童阅读的绘本插画风格。

final_prompt.prompt:
Create an original children's picture book illustration featuring a small red panda reading in a cozy treehouse library.

Style/medium: children's picture book illustration, rounded smooth linework, bright saturated color palette, warm and whimsical in the spirit of Oliver Jeffers and Jon Klassen — suitable for readers aged 3–8
Composition: medium wide shot of the treehouse interior, slightly low angle to feel child-eye-level, full scene with multiple characters visible
Subject: a small red panda wearing round glasses and blue striped overalls, seated in a bean bag chair, holding a large open book; a squirrel organizing books on a nearby shelf; a small bunny napping in a corner
Scene/backdrop: interior of a charming treehouse library — bookshelves on all walls filled with colorful books of various sizes, a circular porthole window, outside the window an autumn forest glowing in golden yellow foliage
Lighting/mood: warm morning sunlight streaming through the circular window, casting soft golden light patches on the open book pages; overall mood cozy, safe, and inviting
Color palette: warm amber and golden yellow from the autumn window light as the dominant tone, blue stripes of the overalls as a cool accent, bookshelves in soft wood tones, books in a rainbow of saturated hues
Materials/textures: flat color with subtle soft texture on fur and fabric, gentle rounded shadows, no harsh outlines
Subject details: beside the red panda sits a steaming mug of cocoa and a small plate of cookies
Constraints: all character shapes must be rounded and soft; no sharp edges; expressions must be gentle and friendly; scene must feel complete and readable as a single spread illustration
Avoid: realistic fur rendering, dark or moody shadows, cluttered illegible background, adult proportions on characters, muted or desaturated colors

Scene/backdrop: deep interior of a lava cavern inside an active volcano; cavern walls streaked with flowing lava channels; far background reveals a cavern entrance through which a single shaft of cool moonlight penetrates; treasure mound strewn with bizarre magical artifacts, ancient suits of armor, and glowing gemstones of various colors

Color palette: deep crimson and black as primary tones anchored in the dragon's body, orange-gold as the dominant ambient light from lava, cool silver-blue moonlight as a contrasting accent at the far entrance, glowing gem colors (emerald, sapphire, violet) as scattered accent points within the treasure pile
Materials/textures: individual scale plates with visible micro-surface detail — overlapping keratin edges, subsurface scatter on thinner membrane areas of the wings; gold coins with worn minting detail; ancient armor with dented and oxidized metal surfaces; raw volcanic rock with glassy obsidian veins and matte ash deposits
Avoid: cartoon or stylized proportions, flat shading, generic fantasy clip-art dragon poses, symmetrical tunnel lighting, over-saturated neon colors, watermark, stuffer quality words", "size": "1792x1008", "quality": "medium", "n": 1, "output_format": "png"}

final_prompt.prompt: 室内设计效果图：一间融合北欧极简主义与日式侘寂美学的现代客厅。空间以白色和浅灰色为主色调，地板采用浅色白橡木实木地板，墙面是哑光白色涂料。主沙发为低矮的亚麻米白色布艺款式，搭配几个不同质感的抱枕。茶几是一块不规则形态的天然石材，保留原始边缘。角落里有一棵高大的琴叶榕盆栽，旁边是一盏细长的弧形落地灯。书架上摆放着少量精选书籍和陶瓷摆件，遵循断舍离原则。大落地窗引入充足的自然光，窗外是模糊的绿色植被。整体营造出一种安静、克制、充满禅意的生活空间氛围，建筑可视化渲染，真实感强，光线自然柔和。

final_prompt.prompt:
Create a photorealistic architectural visualization render of a modern living room blending Nordic minimalism and Japanese wabi-sabi aesthetics.

Style/medium: photorealistic architectural visualization, CGI interior render in the spirit of Norm Architects and Axel Vervoordt, natural and restrained
Composition: wide-angle interior shot at seated eye level, slight three-point perspective to show depth, full room visible with floor-to-ceiling window on one side
Subject: low-profile linen off-white fabric sofa with several throw pillows in varied textures; irregular-edged natural stone coffee table with raw organic silhouette; tall fiddle-leaf fig (琴叶榕) in a corner planter; slender arc floor lamp with a thin stem; open shelving with a sparse curated selection of books and ceramic objects following 断舍离 principles
Scene/backdrop: modern interior living room; pale matte white walls; light-toned white oak solid wood flooring; floor-to-ceiling windows flooding the space with natural daylight; softly blurred green foliage visible outside the window
Lighting/mood: abundant diffused natural daylight from the large floor-to-ceiling window, soft shadows with no harsh edges, warm-neutral color temperature, quiet and meditative zen atmosphere
Color palette: white and light grey as dominant tones, warm pale white-oak wood as grounding accent, muted off-white linen as mid-tone, minimal green from the plant as the sole organic accent
Materials/textures: matte white paint on walls, brushed natural white oak grain on floor, woven linen fabric on sofa, raw stone surface with visible mineral veining on coffee table, unglazed ceramic finishes on shelf objects
Constraints: space must feel uncluttered and restrained; no decorative excess; every object must serve a visual or functional purpose; wabi-sabi imperfection in natural materials must be visible

final_prompt.prompt: 人文纪实摄影风格：印度瓦拉纳西恒河边的清晨祈祷仪式。数百名印度教信徒聚集在恒河的石阶河坛上，进行传统的晨祷仪式。画面中心是一位身着橙色僧袍的老祭司，手持铜制油灯，在袅袅烟雾中虔诚地进行祭祀。周围信徒有的浸入河中沐浴，有的双手合十祈祷，有的在河边点燃油灯放入水中。晨曦的金色阳光从地平线升起，将整个场景染成暖金色调。河面上漂浮着无数盛放鲜花的小油灯，倒映在平静的水面上。整体画面充满宗教仪式感和人文温度，构图采用黄金分割，前景虚化的花瓣，中景是主体人物，背景是恒河对岸的轮廓，胶片质感，色彩浓郁。

final_prompt.prompt:
Create an editorial photo of a Hindu morning prayer ceremony (Ganga Aarti) on the ghats of Varanasi, India, at dawn.

Style/medium: 35mm film photography, humanist documentary style in the spirit of Raghu Rai and Steve McCurry, rich saturated color, visible film grain
Composition: golden-ratio framing — foreground of soft-bokeh flower petals, midground anchored by the elderly priest as main subject, background silhouette of the far bank of the Ganges; wide-angle perspective capturing the full ghat scene
Subject: an elderly Hindu priest at center frame, wearing saffron-orange robes, holding a brass oil lamp (diya), performing aarti with devotion amid curling incense smoke; surrounding devotees — some wading into the river bathing, some standing with palms pressed together in prayer, some kneeling to release flower-laden diyas onto the water; hundreds of worshippers filling the stone steps of the ghat
Scene/backdrop: Varanasi ghats at the Ganges River, early dawn; stone steps descending to the river crowded with pilgrims; countless small flower-filled oil lamps floating on the calm water surface, their reflections shimmering below; silhouetted skyline of the opposite bank on the horizon
Lighting/mood: golden sunrise light breaking from the horizon, washing the entire scene in warm gold; soft volumetric haze from incense and morning mist; sacred, reverent, deeply human atmosphere
Color palette: dominant warm gold and amber from dawn light, saffron orange of the priest's robe as visual anchor, deep river blue as contrast, warm flickering points of diya flame light scattered across water
Materials/textures: rough-hewn sandstone ghat steps, wet stone surfaces, translucent incense smoke wisps, delicate marigold petals in foreground bokeh, brass lamp surface catching light, film grain throughout
Avoid: sterile digital sharpness, tourist-snapshot framing, flat even lighting, desaturated tones, deformed hands or faces, watermark, over-processed HDR look

final_prompt.prompt: 电影海报设计：一部关于人工智能觉醒的科幻惊悚电影的主视觉海报。画面主体是一个半人半机械的面孔，左半边是精致的人类女性面孔，右半边是暴露出精密电路板和金属骨架的机械结构，两者在中线处完美融合过渡。背景是一个巨大的数字矩阵空间，无数绿色代码从天而降。整体色调以冷蓝色和绿色为主，带有强烈的赛博朋克视觉风格。标题文字区域预留在画面下方三分之一处。人物眼神直视观众，一只眼睛是人类的棕色眼睛，另一只是发光的蓝色机械眼。整体构图垂直居中，视觉冲击力强，充满悬疑与科技感，专业电影海报级别的合成与渲染质量。

final_prompt.prompt:
Create an original, non-infringing movie poster for a sci-fi thriller film about the awakening of artificial intelligence.

Style/medium: photorealistic digital compositing, cyberpunk aesthetic, high-contrast editorial poster in the spirit of Blade Runner 2049 key art
Composition: vertical center composition, full-bleed portrait orientation, figure occupying upper two-thirds, lower one-third reserved as title text area, direct eye contact with viewer
Subject: a half-human half-mechanical face — left half is a refined human female face with a warm brown eye, right half exposes intricate circuit boards and metallic skeletal structure with a glowing blue mechanical eye; the two halves merge seamlessly at the center vertical axis
Scene/backdrop: vast digital matrix void — cascading green code characters falling from above in dense vertical streams, deep infinite dark space
Lighting/mood: cold blue ambient fill from below, green code glow casting subtle reflections on the mechanical side, dramatic split-lighting along the center seam, tense and suspenseful atmosphere
Color palette: dominant cold blue and matrix green, warm human skin tone as deliberate contrast anchor on the left half, glowing blue as accent on the mechanical eye
Materials/textures: pore-level human skin texture on the left, precision-machined metal surfaces and hairline circuit traces on the right, visible solder points and fiber-optic filaments
Constraints: lower one-third of frame must remain compositionally clear for title typography overlay; mechanical and organic halves must read as a single unified face at a glance
Avoid: cartoonish or anime stylization, muddy color mixing at the center seam, symmetrical robot face clichés, generic Behance sci-fi glow overload, watermark

Style/medium: photorealistic medical illustration in the tradition of Netter's Atlas of Human Anatomy, combined with modern 3D rendering — precise anatomical draftsmanship, volumetric depth, subsurface scattering on tissue surfaces
Composition: centered frontal view of the heart with a cross-sectional cut revealing internal chambers, major vessels extending outward, generous surrounding negative space reserved for annotation labels
Subject: human heart sectioned open to display all four chambers — left atrium, right atrium, left ventricle, right ventricle — with valve positions and morphology clearly visible (mitral, tricuspid, aortic, pulmonary valves); aorta, pulmonary artery, superior vena cava, inferior vena cava rendered in full; coronary arteries traced along the epicardial surface highlighted in gold; myocardial fiber texture visible on cut surfaces; directional blood-flow arrows with dynamic light-trail effects indicating circulation path
Scene/backdrop: deep dark background (near-black, slightly cool-toned) to maximize anatomical contrast and clarity
Lighting/mood: focused rim lighting and internal glow to separate structures; soft specular highlights on vessel walls; clinical and precise, not dramatic
Color palette: arterial system in vivid oxygenated red; venous system in deep navy blue; coronary artery highlights in warm gold; myocardium in natural deep-rose tissue tone; background near-black — each system color-coded for immediate educational legibility
Materials/textures: smooth glistening endocardial lining, striated myocardial fiber bundles on cut face, semi-translucent vessel walls with visible wall thickness, matte epicardial surface
Constraints: label annotation space must be preserved around all major structures; image must remain legible at textbook print size; color-coding must be consistent and unambiguous for medical education use
Avoid: cartoon or stylized anatomy, excessive lens flare, decorative non-anatomical elements, inaccurate chamber proportions, merged or indistinct valve structures", "size": "1536x1024", "quality": "medium", "n": 1, "output_format": "png"}

final_prompt.prompt: 概念时装设计效果图：以深海生物为灵感来源的高级定制礼服系列。设计师将深海水母、珊瑚礁和生物发光元素融入服装设计中。主打款式是一件拖地晚礼服，裙身采用多层半透明欧根纱，每层都印有水母触须的图案，在灯光下呈现出神秘的蓝紫色荧光效果。胸衣部分以立体刺绣技法呈现珊瑚礁的质感，镶嵌有蓝色、绿色和紫色的施华洛世奇水晶。模特站立于全黑背景前，专业舞台灯光从多角度打亮，使服装的透明质感和发光效果得到最佳呈现。整体画面充满奢华感与艺术性，时装插画与摄影合成风格，色彩以深海蓝、荧光紫、珊瑚橙为主，高级定制时装周大片级别。

final_prompt.prompt:
Create an editorial fashion illustration / photo-composite of a haute couture gown collection inspired by deep-sea creatures, for a couture runway campaign.

Style/medium: fashion illustration blended with photographic compositing, in the spirit of Nick Knight editorial meets haute couture atelier sketch — painterly yet photorealistic fabric rendering
Composition: full-length standing figure, centered, shot straight-on at model eye level, generous negative space above and below to let the gown breathe
Subject: a floor-length evening gown with multi-layered translucent organza skirt, each layer printed with jellyfish tentacle motifs that emit mysterious blue-violet bioluminescent glow under light; structured corset bodice rendered in 3D embroidery replicating coral reef texture, encrusted with blue, green, and purple Swarovski crystals; overall silhouette dramatic and sculptural
Scene/backdrop: pure matte black background, no environment, no floor reflection — full darkness to maximize glow contrast
Lighting/mood: professional stage lighting from multiple angles — key light from above-front, rim lights from both sides — designed to reveal the translucent layered organza and amplify the bioluminescent glow effect; mood is mysterious, luxurious, otherworldly
Color palette: deep-sea navy and midnight blue as dominant base, fluorescent violet and electric purple as bioluminescent accent, coral orange as warm contrast on crystal details, all against absolute black
Materials/textures: sheer multi-layer organza with visible fabric weave and light diffusion; raised 3D coral embroidery with tactile surface relief; faceted crystal catches with point-light sparkle
Constraints: gown must read as wearable haute couture, not costume; crystal encrustation on bodice must be individually distinguishable; jellyfish tentacle prints on each organza layer must be visible as distinct strata
Avoid: generic fantasy dress illustration; flat 2D rendering; overexposed whites washing out translucency; muddy purple-blue blend losing separation; watermark; stuffer quality words

final_prompt.prompt: 乡村田园风光摄影：中国江南水乡的油菜花季。在浙江某个古老村落，漫山遍野的油菜花正值盛开，金黄色的花海延伸至天际线。村落中白墙黑瓦的传统民居散落在花海之间，几缕炊烟从屋顶袅袅升起。村前有一条清澈的小河，河上横跨着一座古老的石拱桥，桥边垂柳依依，嫩绿的柳条随风飘拂。远处丘陵上的茶园呈现出整齐的梯田状绿色纹理，与金黄色的油菜花田形成鲜明的色彩对比。天空是清澈的蓝色，几朵白云点缀其间。画面中有几位身着传统服饰的村民在田间劳作，增添了生活气息。摄影采用无人机航拍与地面长焦镜头相结合，色彩饱和度适中，光线为上午10点的自然光，画面充满诗意与生机。

final_prompt.prompt:
Create an editorial photo of a Jiangnan water-village rapeseed flower season in rural Zhejiang, China, during peak bloom.

Style/medium: photorealistic drone aerial combined with ground-level telephoto, moderate color saturation, poetic and lively pastoral mood in the tradition of Chinese rural landscape photography
Composition: wide establishing aerial view blending into telephoto ground perspective; golden flower fields stretching to the horizon as the dominant plane, traditional village scattered mid-ground, terraced tea hills as distant backdrop
Subject: vast rapeseed flower fields in full bloom — a sea of gold extending to the skyline; white-walled, black-tiled traditional Jiangnan vernacular houses dotted among the flowers with wisps of cooking smoke rising from rooftops; a clear shallow river in the foreground crossed by an ancient stone arch bridge, weeping willows with tender green trailing branches swaying at the bridge's edge; neatly terraced tea gardens on distant hills showing rhythmic green stripes; a few villagers in traditional rural attire working in the fields
Scene/backdrop: ancient village in rural Zhejiang, rapeseed blossom season; clear blue sky with scattered white clouds; terraced tea-garden hills in the far distance contrasting sharply with the golden flower fields
Lighting/mood: natural morning light at approximately 10 a.m., soft directional sunlight, warm golden cast on the flower fields, clean cool blue in the sky, overall mood poetic and full of vitality
Color palette: dominant saturated golden yellow (rapeseed flowers) against cool blue sky; white walls and black roof tiles as neutral anchors; fresh tender green (willow branches and tea terraces) as complementary accent; moderate overall saturation — vivid but not oversaturated
Materials/textures: individual rapeseed flower clusters with visible petal detail, weathered stone arch bridge surface, rippling clear river water reflecting willow green, aged plaster on white walls, layered tea-terrace soil ridges
Avoid: oversaturated HDR processing, plastic foliage, deformed architecture, generic stock-photo flatness, watermark, drone distortion artifacts

final_prompt.prompt: 赛博朋克城市街头场景插画：2077年的新东京街头夜景。在一条狭窄拥挤的霓虹街道上，各种文化元素混杂交融。街道两侧是密密麻麻的日文、中文、英文霓虹招牌，颜色以粉红、青蓝、橙黄为主，将整条街道照得如同白昼。街道上行人摩肩接踵，有身着传统和服但配戴高科技义体的日本女性，有穿着破旧工装的增强改造工人，有全息投影的虚拟偶像在空中表演。地面上积水倒映着所有的霓虹灯光，形成梦幻的镜像效果。空中有无人机快递穿梭，悬浮广告牌播放着各种商品广告。画面景深极深，从近景的街边小摊一直延伸到远处消失在雾霾中的摩天大楼群。整体风格参考《银翼杀手2049》的视觉美学，色彩浓烈，细节密集，充满未来感与末日感并存的独特氛围。

final_prompt.prompt:
Create an original illustration of a cyberpunk city street scene set in Neo-Tokyo, year 2077, at night.

Style/medium: detailed digital illustration, painterly editorial style referencing the visual aesthetics of Blade Runner 2049 — dense layered composition, heavy atmospheric haze, saturated neon against deep shadow
Composition: extreme deep focus from foreground street stalls receding to skyscrapers disappearing in smog on the horizon; mid-height eye-level viewpoint along a narrow crowded alley; wide-angle perspective with strong vanishing point
Subject: a narrow, densely packed neon street — Japanese women in traditional kimono fitted with high-tech cybernetic prosthetics; augmented construction workers in worn overalls with visible body modifications; holographic virtual idol performers projected mid-air; delivery drones weaving overhead; floating advertisement billboards cycling product ads; pedestrians shoulder-to-shoulder filling every inch of the street
Scene/backdrop: Neo-Tokyo street, 2077, deep night; towering buildings on both sides plastered floor-to-ceiling with neon signs in Japanese, Chinese, and English; smog-filled sky barely visible above; puddles on wet pavement perfectly mirroring all neon light in a dreamlike reflection
Lighting/mood: neon-saturated night — dominant pink, cyan-blue, and amber-orange neon signs illuminate the street as bright as daylight; layered light sources from signs, hologram projections, and drone navigation lights; moody, oppressive yet electric atmosphere — futuristic and apocalyptic simultaneously
Color palette: hot pink and cyan-blue as dominant neon anchors, amber-orange as accent warmth, deep charcoal and near-black as shadow base, all reflected and doubled in wet ground puddles
Materials/textures: wet asphalt with mirror-like puddle reflections, worn fabric and rusted metal on workers' gear, glossy cybernetic limb surfaces, translucent hologram light diffusion, dense layered signage surfaces
Text (verbatim): 日文、中文、英文霓虹招牌（内容自由生成，风格一致）
Constraints: maintain extreme scene density and detail depth throughout the full frame; foreground-to-background depth must be legible; neon reflections on wet ground are mandatory visual element
Avoid: clean utopian aesthetics; sparse or minimal composition; daylight or warm natural sunlight; generic sci-fi blue monochrome; flat cel-shading; watermark; empty streets
